new: Match alerts summary on Opportunity Matches and Saved Matches highlights high-signal opportunities and urgent saved deadlines
Sidebar badge on Opportunity Matches shows when new attention-worthy items are waiting
improved: Saved Matches now works as a triage queue instead of a passive list
High-signal match notifications are computed in-app without background jobs or extra setup
fixed: Users no longer need to re-open the full matches feed just to spot urgent saved deadlines

new: SAM.gov workspace URL detection — paste workspace links and they auto-redirect to public format
Product alignment panel in bid evaluation showing per-product match scores
NAICS multi-select combobox with search, paste, and RFP extraction
In-app changelog with What's New badge
improved: Proposal generation now runs in parallel batches of 3 for faster completion
Progress tracking during extraction with step-by-step updates
Better error messages with attempt counts and retry indicators
fixed: Steps failing silently now retry automatically (up to 2 retries with exponential backoff)
Extraction, bid evaluation, and section generation all have built-in retry logic
Empty SAM.gov pages now show helpful guidance about authentication requirements
